title: echinocereus triglochidiatus var. neomexicanus
intro: Echinocereus triglochidiatus var. neomexicanus, commonly known as the Mexican hedgehog, is a cactus species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Echinocereus triglochidiatus var. neomexicanus include the potential treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Echinocereus triglochidiatus var. neomexicanus is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
